name: HP 4000 Tower Nitrogen Generator
description_text:
The new HP 4000 Tower Nitrogen Generator produces nitrogen by utilizing a combination of filtration and pressure swing adsorption (PSA) technology. Standard compressed air is filtered by high-efficiency coMeta-Vcing filters to remove all contaminants down to 5 µm. The air then passes through two columns filled with a proprietary blended carbon molecular sieve (CMS) which adsorbs O2, CO2, and moisture. These are desorbed to the atmosphere during the pressure swing cycle leaving a supply of ultra-pure nitrogen.

The guaranteed flow rate of pure nitrogen is 4000 mL/min.

name: HP Zero 200 HC Tower Nitrogen Generator
description_text: The new HP Zero 200 HC Tower Nitrogen Generator produces nitrogen by utilizing a combination of filtration and pressure swing adsorption (PSA) technology. Standard compressed air is filtered by high-efficiency coMeta-Vcing filters to remove all contaminants down to 5µm. For ultra-sensitive applications such as GC carrier and make-up gas, units also include the additional heated catalyst module to ensure hydrocarbons are removed to <0.1 ppm. The air then passes through two columns filled with a proprietary blended carbon molecular sieve (CMS) which adsorbs O2, CO2, and moisture. These are desorbed to the atmosphere during the pressure swing cycle leaving a supply of ultra-pure nitrogen. The guaranteed flow rate of pure nitrogen is 200 mL/min.
bullet_points: Ideal for GC carrier gas including ECD, make-up gas, TOC, DSC, and ELSD applications

name: Mini Whisper Hybrid Nitrogen Generator
description_text: The Mini Whisper Hybrid Nitrogen Generator has been developed to meet flow, purity, and pressure requirements for LCMS applications that also require filtered and dried air. It can also be used for the evaporation of solvents in samples being analyzed. The simple, high efficiency membrane technology separates nitrogen from the other components of a compressed air supply. The low pressure drop (1 bar) means that the Whisper can share a dry, oil-free compressed air source already in the lab.
bullet_points: Flow rate – curtain gas 12 @ 7 barg (100 psig), exhaust gas 10 @ 4 barg (60 psig), source gas 26 @ 7 barg (100 psig)

name: Mistral Evolution 10 Nitrogen Generator
description_text: The **Mistral Evolution 10** **Nitrogen Generator** (PSA technology), which includes an integral oil-free air compressor, delivers a continuous stream of pure nitrogen gas of >99.5% at a flow rate of 10 L/min. It uses the pressure swing adsorption (PSA) system that removes oxygen, carbon dioxide, and water from compressed air. The resulting stream of pure nitrogen is ideal for LCMS techniques and other inert gas applications.
bullet_points: Oil free, low noise compressor options

name: Mistral Evolution Gas Station Nitrogen Generator
description_text: The new Mistral Evolution Gas-Station is the global dedicated solution for the Microwave Agilent 4100MP system. The well-known and proven pressure swing adsorption (PSA) technology is used to simultaneously generate nitrogen and dry air. This combination allows the system to stabilize quickly and be ready faster. Thanks to a specialized insulation, the Mistral EVO Gas-Station can be installed in the laboratory near the instrument or underneath the laboratory bench.
bullet_points: Oil free, low noise compressor options

name: Mistral Evolution Hybrid Nitrogen Generator
description_text: The Mistral Evolution Hybrid Nitrogen Generator was specifically designed to meet the flow, purity, and pressure requirements of the LCMS of AB SCIEX. The simple and proven pressure swing adsorption (PSA) technology is employed to remove nitrogen from compressed air. Selective mol sieves (CMS) adsorb remaining oxygen and traces of humidity.
bullet_points: Oil free, low noise compressor options

name: NM Plus 100 FID Station Hydrogen Generator
description_text: The NM Plus 100 FID Station Hydrogen Generator uses the latest proton exchange membrane (PEM) technology to produce pure hydrogen at a flow rate of 100 mL/min. The horizontal format is designed to sit under and support the weight of your GC, optimizing bench space. At only 150 mm (6 inches) high, the generator will still allow easy access to the injectors of any GC on the market.

Part# DB-FNM100-EU (230-240V/50-60Hz)
Part# DB-FNM100-US (115V/60Hz)

name: NM Plus 100 FID Tower Hydrogen Generator
description_text:
The space-saving NM Plus 100 FID Tower Hydrogen Generator uses the latest proton exchange membrane (PEM) technology to produce pure hydrogen.

Deionized water is automatically loaded from smart internal system tanks with a 3-liter capacity, providing up to 3000 liters of H2 before a refill is required. The only recommended maintenance is simply replacing the internal deionizing cartridge.
bullet_points: No maintenance cold dual dynamic regeneration drying system

related_products.name: PG Plus 100 FID Tower Hydrogen Generator

name: NM Plus 100 Hydrogen Generator
description_text: The NM Plus 100 Hydrogen Generator enhances the high performance of the PG Plus with the addition of a unique no-maintenance purification system, resulting in ultra-high purity carrier-grade gas. The innovative software control and safety alarm capability maximize the benefits of using hydrogen carrier gas while minimizing the safety concerns.

related_products.name: PG Plus 100 FID Tower Hydrogen Generator
NM Plus 100 FID Tower Hydrogen Generator

name: NM Plus 100 Rack Hydrogen Generator
description_text: The NM Plus 100 Rack Hydrogen Generator uses the latest proton exchange membrane (PEM) technology to produce high purity hydrogen. The exclusive “No Maintenance” gas column cold regeneration system eliminates all the downtime for maintenance that is typical of other systems on the market, assuring the best hydrogen purity at all times.
bullet_points: No maintenance cold dual dynamic regeneration drying system

name: GT Plus 1500 Ultra-Zero Air Generator
description_text:
The **GT Plus 1500 Ultra-Zero Air Generator** are designed to supply ultra pure hydrocarbon-free zero air for GC-FID applications. Catalytic oxidation technology eliminates hydrocarbons to 0.1 ppm, resulting in a flat, stable baseline, increased sensitivity, and repeatable analysis.

The **GT Zero Air Generator** removes CO, CO2, NOX, SOX, and water vapor, making it ideal for demanding applications such as TOC, continuous emissions monitoring, and process control applications.
bullet_points: Zero air purity 0.1 ppm HC, 5 ppm CO2, 0.1 ppm CO, 0.1 ppm NOX and SOX
